mapper.select: SELECT d.date, IFNULL( info.count, 0 ) AS num FROM ( SELECT DATE_ADD( #{startDate}, INTERVAL CAST( help_topic_id AS signed INTEGER ) DAY ) AS `date` FROM mysql.help_topic WHERE help_topic_id < DATEDIFF( #{endDate}, #{startDate} ) + 1 ) AS d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT count( * ) AS count, cast( create_time AS date ) AS date FROM run_info r WHERE r.create_time BETWEEN CONCAT( #{startDate}, " 00:00:00" ) AND CONCAT( #{endDate}, " 23:59:59" ) GROUP BY cast( create_time AS date ) ) AS info ON info.date = d.date;

SELECT count(DISTINCT(run.user_id)) as user, count(*) as count, (sum(run.distance) / 1000) as distance, (sum(run.kcal) / 1000) as kcal FROM run_info AS run JOIN sys_user u ON run.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE YEARWEEK( date_format( run.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ), 1 ) = YEARWEEK( now( ) ) AND run.del_state = 0
${params.dataScope}

SELECT c.datelist, ifnull( sum.USER, 0 ) AS user, ifnull( sum.count, 0 ) AS count, ifnull( sum.distance, 0 ) AS distance, ifnull( sum.kcal, 0 ) AS kcal FROM tb_calendar c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT count( DISTINCT ( run.user_id ) ) AS user, count( * ) AS count, ( sum( run.distance ) / 1000 ) AS distance, ( sum( run.kcal ) / 1000 ) AS kcal, date_format( run.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS create_time FROM run_info AS run JOIN sys_user u ON run.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE YEARWEEK( date_format( run.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ), 1 ) = YEARWEEK( now( ) ) AND run.del_state = 0
${params.dataScope} GROUP BY date_format( run.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) ) sum ON sum.create_time = c.datelist WHERE YEARWEEK( date_format( c.datelist, '%Y-%m-%d' ), 1 ) = YEARWEEK( now( ) ) ORDER BY datelist

SELECT c.datelist, ifnull( sum.USER, 0 ) AS user, ifnull( sum.count, 0 ) AS count, ifnull( sum.distance, 0 ) AS distance, ifnull( sum.kcal, 0 ) AS kcal FROM tb_calendar c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT count( DISTINCT ( run.user_id ) ) AS user, count( * ) AS count, ( sum( run.distance ) / 1000 ) AS distance, ( sum( run.kcal ) / 1000 ) AS kcal, date_format( run.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS create_time FROM run_info AS run JOIN sys_user u ON run.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE YEARWEEK( date_format( run.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ), 1 ) = YEARWEEK( now( ) ) - 1 AND run.del_state = 0
${params.dataScope} GROUP BY date_format( run.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) ) sum ON sum.create_time = c.datelist WHERE YEARWEEK( date_format( c.datelist, '%Y-%m-%d' ), 1 ) = YEARWEEK( now( ) ) - 1 ORDER BY datelist
